summary: Unified Rate Manager feature testing complete. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI loads correctly with proper title, provider badge, three tabs, and agency panel. Navigation shows 'Fiyat & Musaitlik' item in Kanallar dropdown for normal users. Old HR/Exely rate manager pages remain accessible via direct URLs.
features_tested: Backend: GET /api/channel-manager/unified-rate-manager/detect-provider - Returns active provider 'hotelrunner' (PASSED)
Backend: GET /api/channel-manager/unified-rate-manager/grid - Returns calendar grid with room types, rates, availability (PASSED)
Backend: GET /api/channel-manager/unified-rate-manager/room-types - Returns room types, rate plans and pricing settings (PASSED)
Backend: GET /api/channel-manager/unified-rate-manager/agencies - Returns list of active agencies with override info (PASSED)
Backend: POST /api/channel-manager/unified-rate-manager/agency-rates - Saves agency-specific rate overrides (PASSED)
Backend: GET /api/channel-manager/unified-rate-manager/agency-rates/{agency_id} - Returns agency overrides (PASSED)
Backend: DELETE /api/channel-manager/unified-rate-manager/agency-rates/{agency_id} - Deletes overrides (PASSED)
Backend: GET /api/channel-manager/unified-rate-manager/push-providers - Returns push provider info with mode (PASSED)
Backend: GET /api/channel-manager/unified-rate-manager/pricing-settings - Returns pricing type settings (PASSED)
Backend: GET /api/channel-manager/unified-rate-manager/stop-sale-summary - Returns stop sale data (PASSED)
Backend: All endpoints require authentication (PASSED)
Backend: Staff users can access all endpoints (PASSED)
Frontend: /unified-rate-manager page loads with correct title 'Fiyat & Musaitlik Yonetimi' (PASSED)
Frontend: Provider badge shows 'HotelRunner: Shadow Mode' in header (PASSED)
Frontend: Three tabs visible - Toplu Guncelle, Takvim Gorunumu, Stop Sale (PASSED)
Frontend: Calendar grid shows real room data with prices (70 TRY, 140 TRY, 210 TRY) and availability (PASSED)
Frontend: Agency panel on right side shows agencies with checkboxes and commission rates (PASSED)
Frontend: Agencies shown: Antalya Turizm (%12.5), TEST_Content_Agency_093011 (%10) (PASSED)
Frontend: Navigation 'Kanallar' dropdown shows 'Fiyat & Musaitlik' item for normal staff users (PASSED)
Frontend: Old HR Rate Manager page accessible via /hr-rate-manager (PASSED)
Frontend: Old Exely Rate Manager page accessible via /rate-manager (PASSED)
critical_code_review_comments: Unified Rate Manager correctly auto-detects HotelRunner as active provider
Grid endpoint returns proper calendar data with room types, rates, and availability
Agency panel correctly shows active agencies with commission rates and custom rate indicators
Navigation properly configured - 'Fiyat & Musaitlik' visible for normal users, old HR/Exely pages under Teknik Yonetim for admins
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements and flows working correctly)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Rate Manager feature fully tested and working. The page auto-detects HotelRunner as the active provider (Shadow Mode). Calendar grid shows 3 room types (Corner Süit, Standart Oda, Deluxe Oda) with prices and availability. Agency panel shows 2 agencies (Antalya Turizm with 12.5% commission, TEST_Content_Agency_093011 with 10% commission). Navigation correctly shows 'Fiyat & Musaitlik' in Kanallar dropdown for all users. Old HR/Exely rate manager pages remain accessible via direct URLs for admin users.
